zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre於1370年出生時，她的父親Rey Carlos II de Navarra38歲，母親Jeanne de Valois Capet27歲。她於1386年9月2日與Jean V De BRETAGNE結婚。她去世於1437年7月9日在英國英格蘭倫敦哈維林哈維林-亞特-包維爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre was born in 1370, her father, Rey Carlos II de Navarra, was 38 and her mother, Jeanne de Valois Capet, was 27. She married Jean V De BRETAGNE on 2 September 1386. She died on 9 July 1437, in Havering-atte-Bower, Havering, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre est née en 1370, son père, Rey Carlos II de Navarra, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Valois Capet, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Jean V De BRETAGNE le 2 septembre 1386. Elle est décédée le 9 juillet 1437, à Havering-atte-Bower, Havering, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarreが1370年に生まれた時，父Rey Carlos II de Navarraは38歳，母Jeanne de Valois Capetは27歳であった。1386年9月2日にJean V De BRETAGNEと結婚した。彼女は1437年7月9日にイギリスイギリスロンドンヘイバーイングヘイバーイング-アッテ-ボウエルで67歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre(이)가 1370년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Carlos II de Navarra(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Valois Capet(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1386년 9월 2일 Jean V De BRETAGNE(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1437년 7월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 하버링 하버링-엇-보워에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre nasceu em 1370, seu pai, Rey Carlos II de Navarra, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Valois Capet, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean V De BRETAGNE em 2 de setembro de 1386. Ela faleceu em 9 de julho de 1437, em Havering-atte-Bower, Havering, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre родилась в 1370 г., её отцу по имени Rey Carlos II de Navarra было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Valois Capet, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean V De BRETAGNE 2 сентября 1386 г. Она умерла 9 июля 1437 г. в местности хавиринг-атте-боуир, хавиринг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre nació en 1370, su papá, Rey Carlos II de Navarra, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Valois Capet, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jean V De BRETAGNE el 2 de septiembre de 1386. Murió el 9 de julio de 1437, en Havering-atte-Bower, Havering, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
